name: ListImagesRequest
description: ListImagesRequest schema from EC2 Image Builder

allOf.description: The owner defines which images you want to list. By default, this request will only show images owned by your account. You can use this field to specify if you want to view images owned by yourself, by Amazon, or those images that have been shared with you by other customers.

Use the following filters to streamline results:

  • name

  • osVersion

  • platform

  • type

  • version
Requests a list of images with a specific recipe name.
The maximum items to return in a request.
A token to specify where to start paginating. This is the NextToken from a previously truncated response.
Includes deprecated images in the response list.
